message:
fix: openai-compat extracts rate limit headers and propagates reasoning_effort

- Complete() now parses x-ratelimit-* headers via ParseRateLimitHeaders
- Stream() captures rate limit headers from initial HTTP response and
  attaches them to the final Response
- buildRequestBody() now passes through reasoning_effort and metadata
  fields from the unified Request

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
